sourcesContent: import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { FormControl, FormGroup } from '@angular/forms'; @Component({ selector: 'app-evento-detalhe', templateUrl: './evento-detalhe.component.html', styleUrls: ['./evento-detalhe.component.scss'] }) export class EventoDetalheComponent { form: FormGroup | undefined; constructor(){} public validation(): void{ this.form = new FormGroup({ local: new FormControl(), dataEvento: new FormControl(), tema: new FormControl(), qtdPessoas: new FormControl(), // imagemURL: new FormControl(), telefone: new FormControl(), email: new FormControl() }); } }
